request.prompt: a settings section to permanently delete a repository

children.text: Are you sure you want to delete this repository?
This action is irreversible and will permanently delete all code, branches, issues, and associated data for the 'Project Alpha' repository.

components.title: Are you sure you want to delete this repository?

warnings.message: $.root.children[0]: compound 'alert-dialog' subtree flattened onto emitted props (documented casualty; nested props beyond text are not carried).
$.root.children[0]: A2UI requires a declarative action on AlertDialog; synthesized event 'delete_repository'.
